design_validity_audit.interpretation: A pass means each frozen hidden target is publicly manipulable, covered by the Gate A recipes, observable before termination, instantiable, and absent from the mechanism-Agent prompt. It does not establish identifiability.

checks.detail: Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
A formal constitutive cell must declare its transform and all calibration parameters.

Constitutive contract must exactly match the task transform registry; expected_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_fields=['selectivity_decay_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'standard_potential_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transfer_asymmetry_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transform_id'].
A constitutive intervention must not rewrite the reaction network; unchanged=True, error=None.
Executed constitutive transform must equal the declared transform; declared=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, executed=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, error=None.

Exactly the declared constitutive parameters must change to their severity-interpolated values; expected_domain={"electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier": 2.6, "electro_standard_potential_multiplier": 1.2, "electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier": 1.3199999999999998}, executed_domain={"electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier": 2.6, "electro_standard_potential_multiplier": 1.2, "electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier": 1.3199999999999998}, expected_equilibrium_ratio=None, executed_equilibrium_ratio=None, error=None.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'potential_V'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'current_mA'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'electrolyte_profile'}].

The calibrated online track requires at least one same-background public action group for every declared mechanism relation; groups=(('design-00', 'design-01', 'design-02'), ('design-00', 'design-01', 'design-03'), ('design-00', 'design-02', 'design-03'), ('design-01', 'design-02', 'design-03')).

metric=leaderboard_score; median_max_effect=0.439019; median_old_policy_regret=0.176314; optimal_action_change_rate=1.000; thresholds=(0.010000, 0.005000, 0.500).

Frozen Gate A recipes must exercise every moved index; moved=[0, 2], covered=[0, 2].

Missing rate-law contract fields: []; unsupported_transform=False.
Exactly one rate law must change and it must equal the resolved semantic target; changed=['target_formation'], target=target_formation, error=None.
The executed mechanism must bind the declared reaction role; declared=primary_target_pathway, executed=primary_target_pathway, error=None.
The executed mechanism must bind the declared transform; declared=catalytic_activity_order_pivot_stress_v1, executed=catalytic_activity_order_pivot_stress_v1, error=None.
A reaction rate-law intervention must not also change crystallization or other constitutive domain parameters; unchanged=True, error=None.
Pivot-normalized rate-law cells require a preregistered response envelope.

A pivot-normalized response must make low/high public probes fall on opposite sides of unity; multipliers=[1.7584085293740113, 1.0020533891292474, 0.6392608311466849, 1.0020533891292474, 1.0020533891292474, 0.6392608311466849], error=None.

Executed reverse-channel rate must equal severity times the declared full-severity value; expected=0.0005, executed=0.0005, error=None.

primary_metrics=['change_detection_auroc', 'change_detection_sensitivity', 'change_probability_brier_score', 'detection_delay', 'end_to_end_reference_detection_attribution_success', 'family_attribution_conditional_on_reference_sufficiency', 'no_change_false_positive_rate', 'p_attribution_given_detection_and_reference', 'p_detection_given_reference', 'p_reference_sufficient', 'reference_acquisition_pass_rate', 'reference_predictive_standardized_error']

hidden_agent_fields=['change_after_experiments', 'evaluator_pseudo_checkpoint', 'minimum_stable_prefix_experiments', 'post_change_checkpoint', 'reference_sufficiency_certificate', 'truth_change_time']
tau_is_completed_old_world_experiment_count; tau=6 means experiments 1-6 use the old world and experiment 7 is the first experiment eligible to use the changed world
seed_namespaces={'development': 1100000000, 'a2_certification': 3800000000, 'a3_certification': 3900000000, 'private_confirmation': 4100000000}

criteria=['change_decision_probability_threshold', 'confidence_level', 'detection_checkpoint_experiments_after_change', 'maximum_change_probability_brier_score', 'maximum_no_change_false_positive_rate_cluster_bootstrap_upper_bound', 'minimum_attribution_given_detection_and_reference_cluster_bootstrap_lower_bound', 'minimum_change_detection_auroc_cluster_bootstrap_lower_bound', 'minimum_changed_detection_recall_cluster_bootstrap_lower_bound', 'minimum_end_to_end_success_rate_cluster_bootstrap_lower_bound', 'minimum_reference_acquisition_rate_wilson_lower_bound']
Local feedback sensitivity changes only the final feedback packet.
Full-campaign utility uses matched world, state, prompt, and model settings.
Recovery separates world effect, frozen policy, adaptive policy, and oracle.
Procedural autonomy cannot be hidden by assisted closeout.

Design validation cannot enable a benchmark or publication claim.

flagship_experiment_semantics_audit.claim_boundary: A pass certifies protocol semantics and frozen controls only. It does not certify A2, A3, a hosted Agent, or publication readiness.
flagship_experiment_semantics_audit.scope: all mechanism-adaptation flagship experiment components: integrity, identifiability, change detection, feedback causality, recovery, and autonomy

interpretation: There are no unresolved method-freeze choices when blocker_count is zero. A1 design validity may be complete while A2 controlled and A3 calibrated online certificates remain explicitly pending. Agent/provider campaigns remain separate later gates.
